REPLY BRIEF IN SUPP OD MTN FOR SUMM JUDGMNT FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING - A R G U E D; DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO EXHAUST HIS ADMINISTRATIVE & JUDICIAL REMEDY. OBJECTIONS WERE RULED ON THE RECORD. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT COME FORWARD TO A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT AFTER THE DEFENDANT HAS MET ITS BURDEN. REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE IS GRANTED. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FOSTER, DEMARCO TAKE NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO 1) PLAINTIFF DEMARCO FOSTER SHALL TAKE NOTHING BY HIS COMPLAINT IN THIS ACTION. 2. JUDGMENT WITH PREJUDICE SHALL BE ENTERED FORTWITH IN FAVOR OF DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, AND AGAINST PLAINTIFF DEMARCO FOSTER. 3)DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO SHALL RECOVER IT'S COSTS HEREIN AS PERMITTED BY LAW.
